title: turnera joelii
intro: Turnera joelii, also known as the West African damiana, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a stimulant and aphrodisiac, and is known to have effects on the nervous system. The health benefits of Turnera joelii include alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and increasing libido. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water, and is also used in some herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
